app.subtitle: Education platform for registry, archive, and workflow operations

home.badge: Public platform, sign-in only on request
home.title: EguEducation for documents, school governance, and compliance.
home.subtitle: The public page starts without automatic redirects. Authentication is started by the OIDC provider only when the user presses the sign-in button.

documents.title: Registry, document workflow, and eArchive
documents.body: The document area must be rebuilt as a tabbed workspace with server-side PrimeNG tables and clear row actions.

education.title: School requirements modeled explicitly
education.body: Governance, personnel, portfolios, and procedures must come from the requirements catalog, not generic screens.

admin.title: Administration as an operational dashboard
admin.body: Users, positions, permissions, workflows, nomenclatures, and GDPR in one permission-segmented tabbed center.

documenteWorkspace.title: Documents and archiving
documenteWorkspace.subtitle: Registry, document workflows, and eArchive now live in one workspace, with overview separated from daily operations.

cards.registratura: Register, search, classify, and track active documents.
cards.workflow: Operational workflows, tasks, transitions, and dossier blockers.
cards.earchiva: Archive register, retention, and archive intake.

educationWorkspace.title: Education and school governance
educationWorkspace.subtitle: Governance, personnel, managerial dossiers, and portfolios are grouped in one operational workspace arranged by logical activity areas.

cards.governanceBody: Boards, councils, regulations, and decisions tracked in one area.
cards.personnelBody: Personnel records, evaluations, mobility, merit grants, and declarations.
cards.portfolioBody: CD portfolios, retention, transfer, and operational compliance.

adminWorkspace.title: Platform administration
adminWorkspace.subtitle: Users, organizational structure, identity, workflows, and compliance are grouped into one administrative center.

authLogin.title: Sign in with SMS OTP
authLogin.subtitle: Continue the OIDC flow on a dedicated provider page, without popups and without automatic redirects from the public application.
authLogin.codeSent: The SMS code was sent to {{ phone }}. Enter the six-digit code to continue OIDC authorization.
authLogin.requestFailed: The SMS code could not be sent.
authLogin.verifyFailed: The SMS code could not be verified.
authLogin.phoneHint: We will send a six-digit code to this number.
authLogin.codeHint: Type the six digits from the SMS message.
authLogin.cardSubtitle: The OIDC provider sends a six-digit code by SMS and then returns you to the requested page.

oidc.title: OIDC aligned
oidc.body: The provider keeps the redirect flow intact and returns to the original URL after verification.

sms.title: SMS first
sms.body: A phone number is enough to request a six-digit one-time code.

returnUrl.title: Return URL preserved
returnUrl.body: You are sent back to the requested page after the code is verified.

register.title: Start access to the platform
register.subtitle: Choose the account type, confirm consent, and continue with the right method: SMS OTP, passkey, or EUDI Wallet.
register.citizenDesc: For public workflows and verified personal identity access.
register.employeeDesc: For institutional users who will later be approved through affiliation and roles.
register.consentIntro: Confirm the items below before continuing to an access method.
register.gdprConsent: I agree to the processing of my data for authentication and registry purposes.
register.gdprConsentHelp: Consent and the minimum required data will be linked to the OIDC session.
register.ageConfirmation: I confirm that I meet the age requirement to use the platform.
register.ageConfirmationHelp: Registration is intended for eligible institution users.
register.consentRequired: You must accept the consent and age confirmation.
register.methodIntro: Choose the method you want to use for onboarding.
register.smsDesc: Start the classic SMS-authenticated flow and then complete the OIDC redirect.
register.passkeyDesc: Ready for passwordless authentication with biometrics or a hardware key.
register.walletDesc: Ready for digital identity and verified attributes through a wallet.
register.infoConsentTitle: Minimum data and a clear purpose
register.infoConsentBody: Onboarding must stay transparent, minimal, and easy to audit for both sign-in and registration.
register.infoIdentityTitle: Account tied to the right role
register.infoIdentityBody: Institutional accounts can later be validated through affiliation, positions, and extensible roles.
register.infoSecurityBody: SMS OTP, passkeys, and EUDI Wallet offer a modern path as the backend expands.
register.successSms: You can now continue with SMS OTP sign-in.
register.successPasskey: After sign-in, you can add a passkey from your profile.
register.successWallet: Once the full integration is in place, the wallet can be used for login and onboarding.
register.successDefault: Choose the right method and continue in the OIDC flow.
register.footer: For institutional users, final approval may depend on affiliation, position, and the school's internal policy.

auth.callbackMessage: We are signing you in and redirecting you back to the application.
auth.loginTitle: Secure authentication for registry, workflows, and education modules
auth.loginBody: We start with redirect-based OIDC in the same visual language as the main app, while SMS OTP, passkeys, and EUDI Wallet stay ready inside the same experience.

register.title: Choose a path into the platform
register.subtitle: This page is informational in this build: it helps users pick a role, confirm consent, and continue through the existing authentication flow.
register.cardSubtitle: We do not invent a new API here. Each button returns you to the live OIDC or SMS sign-in flow.

account.title: Choose the right role
account.body: Pick the account type that best fits the person who will use the platform.

consent.title: Review the acknowledgements
consent.body: Confirm that you understand how onboarding is handled in this frontend.

entry.title: Return to the live sign-in paths
entry.body: Classic SMS or the standard OIDC start page are the only active routes here.

staff.title: School staff
staff.body: For teachers, administrators, and employees using institution-managed identities.

community.title: Community user
community.body: For parents, guardians, and collaborators who only need the public entry points.

register.info: Self-service registration is not enabled in this frontend. Use the existing sign-in pages to continue.

items.provisioning: I understand account provisioning is handled outside this frontend.
items.flow: I agree to continue only through the existing SMS or OIDC sign-in pages.

entry.info: Choose one of the existing sign-in routes. Classic sends you to SMS OTP; wallet goes to the standard OIDC start page.

classic.title: SMS sign-in
classic.body: Use the phone-based OTP page and then return to the app.

wallet.title: OIDC start
wallet.body: Use the existing redirect-based flow for wallet-ready identities.

auth.loggedOutBody: You can sign in again at any time or return to the public dashboard.

visual.title: Secure access to education and administration services.
visual.body: The same visual language across login, consent, and logout, with redirect-based OIDC, SMS OTP, and architecture ready for passkeys and wallet-based identity.

consent.title: Review the requested permissions before you continue
consent.subtitle: The authentication client uses the same secure flow as the rest of the app. Choose which verified data can be shared for this session.
consent.clientBody: is requesting access to your verified data to complete sign-in.
consent.unavailable: The consent request is no longer available or has expired.
consent.gdpr: By continuing, you agree to the processing of the requested data under the institution's policies and Regulation (EU) 2016/679.

messages.selectScope: Select at least one permission to continue.
messages.saveFailed: The consent decision could not be saved.

logoutConfirm.title: Do you want to close the current session?
logoutConfirm.subtitle: Signing out revokes local tokens and closes the web session used by the OIDC provider.
logoutConfirm.body: After signing out, you will need to authenticate again to continue in the administrative or education modules.
logoutConfirm.error: The session could not be fully closed. Please try again.

accessDenied.title: You do not have the required permission for this area
accessDenied.subtitle: The roles, positions, or active modules in the current session do not allow access to the requested resource.
accessDenied.supportHint: If this access should be available, review the user's membership, operational position, and assigned permissions in administration.

methodDescriptions.oidc_redirect: Primary authentication flow based on redirects, authorization code, and PKCE.
methodDescriptions.sms_otp: One-time codes sent over SMS for verification and step-up authentication.
methodDescriptions.passkey: Modern passwordless authentication with hardware keys or biometrics.
methodDescriptions.eudi_wallet: Prepared integration for digital identity and attestations presented through a wallet.

messages.sendFailed: The SMS OTP could not be sent.

dashboard.title: The new EguEducation foundation is ready for rapid delivery.
dashboard.subtitle: Responsive shell, OIDC authentication, internationalization, red/rose theme, and an administrative foundation for the education modules.

registratura.title: Registry and documents
registratura.body: Full document lifecycle for versions, attachments, classification, and audit.

workflow.title: Workflow engine
workflow.body: Configurable definitions, task inbox, SLAs, transitions, and administrative governance.

archive.title: eArchive
archive.body: Funds, series, retention, and manual or automatic archiving.

education.title: Education modules
education.body: School boards, managerial dossiers, personnel, and professional portfolios.

admin.title: Administrative dashboard
admin.subtitle: This becomes the control center for users, positions, permissions, workflows, nomenclatures, archive, and GDPR.
admin.comingSoon: The section is prepared for the full implementation of the functionality.
